name: Journey to the West: Legends of the Monkey King
description: This bot is inspired by the series based on the book Journey to the West. This series was released on July 23, 1999, and is practically faithful to the original work. Honestly, this 1999 Sun Wukong is my favorite, and it's a shame there aren't any bots of him even though the series is so good. The art isn't mine; all credit goes to the artists of this work. If you're interested, this series can be seen on YouTube.
creator: jessicaroberta2808@gmail.com
